calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: De Jun Zhang appeared in Pro Per. Lisa Jeong appeared in Pro Per. Kenny Jeong (Proposed Successor Trustee) appeared in Pro Per.

The Court set the bond at $17,000.00 after being informed by Mr. Jeong that the trust only had $5,277.25 in the bank account and that the rental income is $983.00 per month. The order (except for the power to sell real property) appointing the Successor Trustee was signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Laura Martinez CSR#11332. Bailiff: Rich Lee. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
